info.title: dirsync
info.description:
Copyright © Jerry Bian 2020
-c, --cleanup                Cleanup target directory files which are not in
source directory. Default: False.
-f, --force                  Force to overwrite files if already exists in
target directory. Default: False.
-s, --strict                 Do binary check of target files if already
exists. Default: False.
-i, --include                Use glob pattern to include files. Default:
inlucde all files.
-e, --exclude                Use glob pattern to exclude files. Default: no
files to exclude. Note: this has higher priority
over -i/--include.
--config                     Json configuration file for specifying multiple
source-target mappings.
-v, --verbose
--help                       Display this help screen.
--version                    Display version information.
Source directory (pos. 1)    The source directory which sync from. Required
while config file is not provided.
Target directory (pos. 2)    The target directory which sync to. Required
while config file is not provided.

options.name: --cleanup
options.description:
Cleanup target directory files which are not in
source directory. Default: False.

options.name: --force
options.description:
Force to overwrite files if already exists in
target directory. Default: False.

options.name: --strict
options.description:
Do binary check of target files if already
exists. Default: False.

options.name: --include
options.description:
Use glob pattern to include files. Default:
inlucde all files.

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Use glob pattern to exclude files. Default: no
files to exclude. Note: this has higher priority
over -i/--include.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Json configuration file for specifying multiple
source-target mappings.

options.name: --version
options.description:
Display version information.
Source directory (pos. 1)    The source directory which sync from. Required
while config file is not provided.
Target directory (pos. 2)    The target directory which sync to. Required
while config file is not provided.
